title: The Man Company is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: The Man Company is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate E-commerce Executive with drive and ambition, The Man Company in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About The Man Company:
The Man Company is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Man Company!
